name: @onlook/code-provider
description: A library with a set of providers for code sandboxing

scripts._test_disabled_in_ci: bun test — disabled because expo-browser/__tests__/integration.test.ts requires a live local Supabase on 127.0.0.1:54321 and its skip-on-unreachable gate doesn't behave correctly under GitHub Actions runners. 109 unit tests in this package run cleanly locally; 3 integration tests fail in CI. Re-enable by either (a) wiring `bun --filter @onlook/backend start` into the CI Run-tests step before this package's tests run, or (b) gating the integration suite on `process.env.CODE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION === '1'` and removing the unconditional `if (!supabaseAvailable) return` skip pattern.
